eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Ouray, CO; at 4:17 PM on JUN 28, 2026 Effective until 10:17 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a public safety message from Ouray County Emergency Management. This is a PRE-EVACUATION notice for homes between Pecks trailer park and Cedar Hill Cemetery (WEST of Hwy 550). Collect important documents and medications and be ready to leave at a moments notice. This is a public safety message from Ouray County Emergency Management.
